details.special: PSI: Thought Shield WT: Know Direction, All-Round Vision Powers: 3 Rank: 1st Dive Attack: The Pterrax dives onto its target and bites it, dealing 2d6 extra damage. Pterrans are a race of lizard men who inhabit the Hinterlands near the Ringing Mountains. system.description:
The inix is a large lizard midway in size between a horse and an elephant. Athasians use them as beasts of burden.
